title: Fabulous VHS
description: This shaderpack adds a VHS style to the good old game minecraft!
body:
## **Fabulous VHS**
Fabulous VHS is a stylized shader pack for Minecraft designed to recreate the distinct look and feel of 1990s analog media. Rather than aiming for modern realism, this pack focuses on atmosphere, nostalgia, and the "imperfections" of vintage video.
Visual Style

The core of this pack is built around a custom color grade that mimics aged magnetic tape. You will notice softer contrast, slightly desaturated tones, and a warm glow that makes lighting feel more organic and less digital.

## **Key Features**
Analog Distortion: Subtle jitter and tape-wear effects that give the screen a physical, mechanical feel.
Chromatic Aberration: Realistic color fringing on the edges of blocks and high-contrast areas.
CRT Scanlines: An optional, fine-grid overlay that replicates the experience of playing on an old tube television.
Bloom & Halation: A heavy, dream-like light bleed that makes torches and lanterns pop against the grainy shadows.
Lofi Color LUTs: A curated color palette that softens the harsh greens and blues of vanilla Minecraft.
Technical Details
This pack is built with performance in mind. Because it avoids heavy ray-tracing or complex water physics, it should run smoothly on most mid-range hardware.
Supported Platforms: Fabric (Iris), Quilt (Iris), and Forge (Oculus).
Recommended Settings: For the best experience, I recommend turning off the internal "Fabulous" graphics setting in Minecraft and letting the shader handle the transparency layers.

## **Installation**
Ensure you have the Iris or Oculus mod installed. Drop the .zip file into your shaderpacks folder and enable it in the in-game Video Settings menu.
